title: Add cycle-39 wording variant to purpose banlist (continuing the adversarial loop)

evidence.ref: cycle-39 fixture decision-positive-cycle-1780487001 with purpose 'Validate a unique accepted decision record in platform governance scope'

examples: Long-term move (NOT in D020 scope): content-level dedup — canonicalize fixture content (strip id/title/self-ref/timestamps) and hash. Two fixtures with the same canonical hash are duplicates regardless of purpose wording. Would catch all wording-variation attacks at once. Open as future decision when this loop's cost exceeds the engineering cost of canonical hashing.
